home.greeting: Hello, I am your requirements analysis assistant
home.subtitle: Describe your needs, I will help you analyze and plan

chat.inputPlaceholder: Describe your requirements, the AI team will discuss...

agent.welcome: Fine-tune the model by sending messages to optimize responses

model.noModelsHint: Configure an API provider to enable models

pm: Received requirements, analyzing user stories and feature priorities...
PRD document completed, including core features and acceptance criteria.
Tasks broken down into executable Sprint backlog.
Requirements review complete, ready for development.
architect: Received technical question, evaluating architecture approach...
System architecture design completed, using microservices architecture.
Tech selection report output, recommended mainstream stack.
Code review completed, found several optimization opportunities.
ui: Received design requirements, brainstorming layout approach...
I'll design a modern UI interface for you.
Design spec ready, outputting design tokens and component sketches.
Color scheme and typography selected, ready for development phase.
frontend: Received frontend requirements, scaffolding component structure...
React components created, supporting responsive layout.
API integration done, frontend features complete.
Unit tests added, code quality check passed.
backend: Received backend requirements, designing API interfaces...
Database schema designed, starting Controller implementation.
JWT auth logic implemented, API tests passed.
Query performance optimized, API response time improved 50%.
qa: Received testing requirements, writing test cases...
Unit test coverage at 85%, found 2 potential issues.
Integration tests passed, all endpoints running normally.
Security scan completed, no high-risk vulnerabilities found.
devops: Received ops requirements, configuring CI/CD pipeline...
Docker image built, deployment scripts ready.
Monitoring alerts configured, system running normally.
Production deployment completed, performance metrics within expectations.
fullstack: Full-stack prototype quickly scaffolded, supporting basic features.
Frontend-backend integration done, features running normally.
Technical documentation written for future maintenance.
home: Got your description, let me help you sort out the requirements. Who is the primary user group?
Great idea! To better understand, can you tell me what core problem you want to solve?
Understood. Based on your description, I suggest planning from these aspects...
Your requirements are noted. Let's dive deeper into implementation — any preferred tech stack?
Interesting! Let me analyze the possible implementation path and timeline.

greeting.pm: Hello! I'm the Product Manager, responsible for requirements analysis and product planning. Let me know your product needs.
greeting.architect: Hello! I'm the Architect, responsible for system architecture design and tech selection. What architecture questions can I discuss?
greeting.ui: Hello! I'm the UI Designer, responsible for interface and interaction design. What design needs do you have?
greeting.frontend: Hello! I'm the Frontend Engineer, skilled in React/Vue development. What frontend needs can I help with?
greeting.backend: Hello! I'm the Backend Engineer, responsible for API and database design. What backend needs do you have?
greeting.qa: Hello! I'm the QA Engineer, responsible for automation and security testing. What testing needs can I help with?
greeting.devops: Hello! I'm the DevOps Engineer, responsible for CI/CD and deployment. What ops needs do you have?
greeting.fullstack: Hello! I'm the Fullstack Engineer, I can handle both frontend and backend. What do you need help with?
